_comment: Mutation testing measures TEST STRENGTH (do our tests actually catch bugs?) — the rigorous metric line coverage can't give, and which esbuild tree-shaking hides. Command runner against our esbuild unit harness; the command runs ONLY the test files that cover the mutated sources (fast). Scoped to small, pure, heavily-tested logic; widen `mutate` for a deeper nightly pass. Run: npm run test:mutation

commandRunner.command: node test/run-unit.mjs test/kernel/reveal.test.ts test/kernel/ranges.test.ts test/kernel/outline.test.ts test/kernel/hostAdapters.test.ts
